title: Mandalore the First

'''Mandalore the First''' was a [[Taung/Legends|Taung]] warrior who conquered a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that he would name after [[Mandalore/Legends|himself]]. He and his Taung followers were originally from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and had settled on [[Roon/Legends|Roon]]. Under Mandalore rule, the Taung tamed the savage landscape of the newly christened planet in his name while slaughtering the gigantic [[Mythosaur/Legends|Mythosaurs]] that had made the world their home.<ref name="Atlas" />

According to legend, he formed the [[Mandalorian Crusaders]] on Mandalore approximately around [[7000 BBY]],<ref name="Atlas" /> though [[Mandalore the Conqueror]] was actually the Crusaders' first leader. Mandalore the First was the earliest known wearer of a [[Mandalore's Mask|ceremonial mask]],<ref name="Encyclopedia">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref> carved from the rigid [[Bone/Legends|bone]] of a mythosaur's [[sternum]] taken from the slain creature's heart,<ref name="TBHC">''[[The Bounty Hunter Code: From the Files of Boba Fett]]''</ref> and modeled after the facial features of the Taung species.<ref name="Encyclopedia" /> He was also the first person to use the title [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|''Mand'alor'']].<ref name="The History of the Mandalorians">{{InsiderCite|80|The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors}}</ref> As his fame and achievements grew, Mandalore's mask became the symbol of his power and leadership to all Mandalorians.<ref name="Encyclopedia" />
